name: AI Tool Radar - CLEAN Ingest Workflow

parameters.jsCode:
const edges = $json?.data?.posts?.edges || [];
return edges.map((edge) => ({ json: { title: edge?.node?.name || '', source: 'ProductHunt', summary: edge?.node?.tagline || edge?.node?.description || '', url: edge?.node?.url || '', published_date: edge?.node?.createdAt || '', created_at: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'New' } }));

const repos = $json.items || [];
return repos.map((repo) => ({ json: { title: repo.name || '', source: 'GitHub', summary: repo.description || '', url: repo.html_url || '', published_date: repo.created_at || '', created_at: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'New' } }));
